productsSection.title: Strength, Lightness and Durability
productsSection.subtitle: Revolutionize your roofing projects with Tessa metal structures, synonymous with efficiency and durability.

qualitySection.title: Longevity: Tessa Quality
qualitySection.subtitle: Discover why Tessa is the right choice for your construction.

estruturas-ecologicas.title: Ecological Structures
estruturas-ecologicas.description: Our metal roof structures have a low environmental impact and reduce material waste.

maior-economia.title: Greater Savings
maior-economia.description: With excellent cost-benefit at every stage, Tessa structures are economical for your project.

forca-leveza-resistencia.title: Strength, Lightness and Durability
forca-leveza-resistencia.description: Tessa structures have a service life of up to 60 years after assembly, are lighter than wood and easier to install.

maior-produtividade.title: Greater Productivity
maior-produtividade.description: Productivity per installed square meter is up to 3 times higher compared to conventional wood systems.

imune-ataque-cupins.title: Immune to Termite Attack
imune-ataque-cupins.description: Galvanized steel is resistant to termite attack and urban pest proliferation, reducing maintenance costs.

estruturas-duraveis.title: Durable Structures
estruturas-duraveis.description: Structures are produced in galvanized steel with durability exceeding 60 years.

carport.title: Carport
carport.description: Tessa solar carports in galvanized steel: vehicle protection, shade, and clean energy generation with custom-made parts and photovoltaic panels.
carport.metaKeywords: Carport, solar carport, vehicle shelter, galvanized steel, photovoltaic panels, clean energy, metal structure

introSection.title: Customized Solutions for your Projects
introSection.subtitle: Custom-made parts in galvanized steel and industrial cost reduction.

whatIsSection.title: What is a Carport?
whatIsSection.description: A Carport is an innovative solution for parking lots, providing protection and shade for vehicles while simultaneously generating clean energy. The structures are made of galvanized steel and allow for the installation of photovoltaic panels.
whatIsSection.imageAlt: 3D render of a solar carport structure made of galvanized steel with photovoltaic panels for clean energy generation

videoSection.title: Video about the Carport
videoSection.subtitle: Click to get to know our industry and discover details about the production of our Carports.

project-types.title: Does it work for any type of project?
project-types.description: Carports can be installed in commercial and residential projects. They adapt to different spaces and offer easy installation, providing a sustainable solution for parking areas.

benefits.title: What are the benefits of a Carport?
benefits.description: Carports offer a range of benefits. First, by replacing traditional roofing with photovoltaic panels, you embrace the clean energy generation trend. Additionally, it is a durable structure resistant to corrosion, providing shade for vehicles while generating sustainable energy.

beyond-benefits.title: The benefits go even further!
beyond-benefits.description: You will save on energy at the end of the month, reducing your operating costs, and you can use that energy to power your own business or even charge electric vehicles, contributing to a more sustainable future. Solar panels have a long lifespan, averaging 30 years, ensuring decades of savings and clean energy.

clampSection.title: Tessa Panel Mounting Clamp
clampSection.description: A practical and exclusive system where installation is done from below the structure using only two self-drilling screws. It is flexible because it does not require a fixed point on the purlin or PV panel for attachment.
clampSection.imageAlt: Patent seal for the Tessa Panel Mounting Clamp for solar carport
